message:
Optimize DetHasher with specialized write methods

- det_hash.rs: Add mix_byte() helper method, implement write_u8/u16/u32/u64/u128
  specialized methods using native byte order for consistent hashing behavior
  across platforms; reduces overhead for common integer types vs byte-by-byte
- stream.rs: Minor cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
